title: Anthropic’s new Claude feature is quietly selling you on AI
summary: Anthropic has launched a Reflect dashboard that visualizes users' Claude usage patterns, showing how deeply the AI has integrated into their daily work. The feature is designed to highlight users' reliance on the chatbot while presenting analysis of their interaction data. This marks Anthropic's entry into the trend of year-in-review features pioneered by platforms like Spotify.
content: Claude’s new Reflect dashboard doesn’t just visualize how you use AI. It also subtly reinforces how much of your daily work now depends on Anthropic’s chatbot.

zh.title: Anthropic 新推出的 Claude 功能正在悄悄地向你推销 AI
zh.summary: Anthropic 推出了一个 Reflect 仪表板，可视化用户的 Claude 使用模式，展示 AI 如何深度融入他们的日常工作。该功能旨在突出用户对聊天机器人的依赖，同时展示他们的交互数据分析。这标志着 Anthropic 进入了由 Spotify 等平台开创的年度回顾功能的趋势。

title: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX are bigger than the last 25 years of tech exits
summary: Anthropic, OpenAI, and SpaceX's pending IPOs are projected to create more value than all U.S. venture-backed tech exits from 2000 to 2025 combined. The anticipated valuations underscore massive capital concentration in AI and space technology. This represents a significant shift in how value is being created and distributed in the technology industry.
content: Three big AI IPOs are set to generate more value than all the U.S. VC backed exits since 2000.

zh.title: Anthropic、OpenAI 和 SpaceX 的规模超过了过去 25 年的科技退出
zh.summary: Anthropic、OpenAI 和 SpaceX 即将进行的 IPO 预计将创造比 2000 年至 2025 年间所有美国风险投资支持的科技退出加起来还要多的价值。预期的估值强调了人工智能和太空技术中的大规模资本集中。这代表了技术行业价值创造和分配方式的重大转变。

title: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are steeply discounted
summary: Sonos Ace wireless headphones are currently on sale for $279, down from their $399 regular price across major retailers. The premium headphones feature industry-leading active noise cancellation, 30-hour battery life, and spatial audio support for Sonos soundbar users. The substantial discount makes high-end wireless headphones more accessible for summer use.
content:
If you’re looking for a discount on a great pair of active noise-canceling headphones for your summer adventures (even if they’re indoors), you’re in luck. The Sonos Ace headphones in black are currently on sale for $279 (usually $399) at a variety of retailers, including Amazon, Best Buy, Walmart, and directly from Sonos. Weirdly, the white version is discounted at all.
The Ace are as comfortable as they are attractive, with an expansive soundstage and balanced sound profile that’s less bass-forward than some competitors released around the same time like the Sony WH-1000XM5. Some people might like that. Their active noise cancellation effect is one of the best we’ve tested yet, with an impressive transparency mode to match, and they can run for up to 30 hours on a single charge.
Sonos Ace
The Sonos Ace are the company’s first set of wireless headphones. They feature a premium, comfortable build and active noise cancellation, along with compatibility with Sonos Arc and other Sonos soundbars.

Where to Buy:

 $399 $279 at Amazon
 $399 $279 at Sonos
 $399 $279 at Best Buy

Those who have a Sonos soundbar can switch the audio over to the Ace headphones with a single button press. You’ll then get spatial audio support with head tracking for watching your movies, TV shows, or playing games. They also support multipoint Bluetooth pairing, with aptX Lossless and AAC codec support, depending on the mobile device you connect it to. The Ace supports lossless audio when linked to devices via USB-C.
Read our Sonos Ace review.
Other deals to consider
If you’re a member of DoorDash’s premium DashPass plan, you can save $30 on a purchase of $100 or more from Best Buy. You can find the discount by navigating to Best Buy in the DoorDash app (iOS or Android), and it will automatically apply to eligible purchases at checkout. The promotion is available through July 15th.
Green Man Gaming is selling a bundle of seven good Lego video games for $9. It includes Steam keys for Lego Star W

zh.title: Sonos Ace 无线耳机大幅折扣
zh.summary: Sonos Ace 无线耳机目前在各大零售商处以 279 美元的价格出售，低于其 399 美元的常规价格。这款高端耳机具有业界领先的主动降噪、30 小时电池续航和对 Sonos 音响条的空间音频支持。这种大幅折扣使高端无线耳机在夏季使用中更加经济实惠。

title: The PocketMage resurrects the PDA with an e-paper screen
summary: Talisman Design is crowdfunding the PocketMage, a clamshell PDA that revives the personal digital assistant category with modern technology including e-paper and OLED displays. The device combines a tactile keyboard with dual-screen technology and is available for pre-order at $185-$235 on Crowd Supply. This represents a nostalgia-driven revival of a device category that became obsolete with the rise of smartphones.
content:
Personal digital assistants like the iconic Palm Pilot were one of many devices we thought went extinct with the arrival of the smartphone. But similar to Canon resurrecting a nearly decade-old digital camera to appeal to point-and-shoot fans, Talisman Design is crowdfunding a clamshell PDA called the PocketMage that combines a tactile keyboard with both e-paper and OLED displays in a pocketable device.
There are two different preorder options for the PocketMage on Crowd Supply, plus you get your choice of parchment (gray) or royal purple accent colors. The $235 version comes fully assembled, while the cheaper $185 version requires you to b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: PocketMage 用电子纸屏幕重振个人数字助理
zh.summary: Talisman Design 正在众筹 PocketMage，一款翻盖式个人数字助理，通过电子纸和有机发光二极管等现代技术重新激活了这一类别。该设备结合了触感键盘和双屏技术，在 Crowd Supply 上提供 185-235 美元的预订价格。这代表了一次基于怀旧的复兴，该设备类别随着智能手机的兴起而过时。

title: Sony brings back the superzoom RX10 with a stacked sensor and a high price
summary: Sony has revived the RX10 superzoom camera after nine years with the RX10 V, featuring a new stacked 20.1-megapixel sensor capable of 30fps continuous shooting for action and sports photography. The camera retains the signature 25x zoom lens while delivering significant technical upgrades, though the $2,299.99 price tag is substantially higher than the previous generation. The launch marks Sony's return to the professional-grade all-in-one camera market.
content:
The big boy is back. | Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Sony is bringing back the RX10 superzoom camera after a nearly nine-year gap between models. The newly announced RX10 V retains the same 24-600mm equivalent f/2.4-4 Zeiss Vario-Sonnar 25x zoom lens of its last two predecessors, but it has lots of upgrades elsewhere. The new 20.1-megapixel 1-inch-type sensor is a stacked design, allowing up to 30fps continuous burst shooting without any blackout (up from the last-gen's 24fps). That's a nice improvement for a camera aimed at action, sports, and wildlife photography, but it will come at a steep cost of $2,299.99 when the camera launches in early August.
The RX10 IV launched at $1,700 in 2017.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼推出配备堆叠传感器和高价格的超变焦 RX10
zh.summary: 索尼在九年后推出 RX10 V 超变焦相机，配备新的堆叠式 2010 万像素传感器，能以 30fps 连拍速度进行运动和体育摄影。该相机保留了标志性的 25 倍变焦镜头，同时提供重大技术升级，但 2299.99 美元的价格标签比上一代大幅上升。此举标志着索尼重返专业级一体化相机市场。

title: Comcast is breaking up with NBCU. Why did it ever buy it in the first place?
summary: Comcast announced it is splitting into separate broadband and entertainment companies, ending its decades-long "content plus pipes" strategy of combining media assets with distribution networks. The breakup reflects the failure of the media-telecom convergence model, which has also been attempted unsuccessfully by AT&T, Verizon, and AOL. This signals a major shift away from the vertical integration approach that once dominated media and telecommunications strategy.
content:
Today on Decoder, I’m talking with Peter Kafka, who is chief correspondent at Business Insider and host of Channels, a podcast about the media industry.
And it’s a big week for the media industry — Comcast just announced that it’s splitting itself up, into the Comcast broadband company and the NBCUniversal entertainment company. That’s after the media giant spun out its cable assets like CNBC and MS.NOW into a new company called Versant earlier this year.
A quick note, by the way — longtime Verge fans know we’ve been disclosing that Comcast NBCUniversal was an investor in our parent company, Vox Media, for years now. That’s come to an end — not only did that investment spin out with Versant, but Vox Media itself is splitting in two, and that Versant stake now lives inside of a shell company that is part of a joint venture with the Penske Media Corporation called PMX, which technically does not exist yet. 
It is very complicated, and I promise I will sort out a simpler disclosure when all of these deals close. But for now the upshot is the same as ever: None of these companies have ever told us what to do or say in our reporting, and we wouldn’t let them if they tried.



Verge subscribers, don’t forget you get exclusive access to ad-free Decoder wherever you get your podcasts. Head here. Not a subscriber? You can sign up here. 
That is good, because, boy, do Peter and I have a lot to say about Comcast. He and I have been covering media and telecom as friends, peers, and competitors for years now, and Comcast was the biggest bet on the idea that combining media assets like NBC with access and distribution like Comcast’s broadband network would somehow pay off. This idea, which you’ll hear us loosely call content plus pipes, is irresistible to media and telecom people. They cannot stay away from it. 
AT&T tried content plus pipes when it bought Time Warner. Verizon tried content plus pipes when it bought AOL and Yahoo, and, hell, AOL tried content plus pipes when it b

zh.title: 康卡斯特与 NBCU 分手。它为什么一开始要收购它呢？
zh.summary: 康卡斯特宣布将分拆为独立的宽带和娱乐公司，结束了数十年来"内容加管道"战略，即结合媒体资产和分销网络。此次分拆反映了媒体电信融合模式的失败，AT&T、威瑞森和美国在线也曾尝试但均未成功。这标志着从曾经主导媒体和电信战略的垂直整合方式进行重大转变。

title: Meta says its new AI model is ready to compete on coding
summary: Meta has released Muse Spark 1.1, an improved version of its in-house AI coding model with enhanced bug detection, complex task handling, and multimodal capabilities. The company is launching a Meta Model API to enable developers to integrate the model into coding tools and workflows. This represents Meta's competitive effort to challenge existing AI coding assistants and establish itself in the developer tools market.
content:
After reentering the AI race with its first in-house Muse Spark model in April, Meta is now opening up the doors to developers with a new model that can plug into AI coding software with the new Meta Model API.
Meta says that Muse Spark 1.1 is a "step-change" from the first generation, with improvements based on feedback from developers. The company says it's capable of more advanced coding, including detection and fixing of complex bugs; better supports end-to-end agentic workflows across a range of apps, including multi-agent systems; and has native multimodal perception across images, videos, and documents.
The Muse Spark 1.1 launch fol …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Meta表示其新AI编码模型已准备好与竞争对手抗衡
zh.summary: Meta发布了Muse Spark 1.1，这是其内部AI编码模型的改进版本，具有更好的bug检测、复杂任务处理和多模态功能。该公司正在推出Meta Model API，使开发人员能够将该模型集成到编码工具和工作流中。这代表了Meta与现有AI编码助手竞争并在开发者工具市场确立地位的努力。

title: ICE agents are making house calls for online critics
summary: Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents have begun visiting the homes of individuals who have made critical comments about ICE online, including leaving warning notices about threats against ICE personnel. The practice raises significant concerns about free speech implications and government surveillance of online critics. The incident highlights the potential chilling effect on public discourse about government agencies.
content:
A few hours after checking into a hotel in New York City, David Streever woke up to a call from the front desk saying someone was looking for him. 
Streever had just landed on a return trip from Finland, where he'd vacationed with his daughter. Though Streever didn't know it yet, while he'd been away, agents with the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) had shown up to his home in Rochester and spoken to his wife. They dropped off a "WARNING NOTICE," which informed Streever that ICE's Office of Professional Responsibility (OPR) is "responsible for enforcing crimes against the United States," including "threats made against ICE personnel."  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: ICE特工正在对网络批评家进行家庭访问
zh.summary: 移民和海关执法特工开始访问那些在网上对ICE发表批评评论的个人的家中，包括留下有关对ICE人员威胁的警告通知。这种做法引发了关于言论自由问题和政府对网络批评家监视的重大关切。该事件突出了对关于政府机构的公开讨论可能产生的寒蝉效应。

title: Free Waymo rides in California? You can thank a regulatory quirk.
summary: A regulatory delay in California may allow Waymo to offer free robotaxi rides for an extended period before approval requirements take effect. The quirk in the approval process creates a window where Waymo can operate its Ojai vehicle without certain standard fee regulations. This represents an unusual opportunity for the company to expand its autonomous vehicle service during a transitional regulatory period.
content: State agency's delay could mean free robotaxi rides in company’s new Ojai vehicle for a few months.

zh.title: 加州的免费Waymo乘车？要感谢一项监管漏洞
zh.summary: 加州的监管延迟可能允许Waymo在批准要求生效之前的较长时期内提供免费机器人出租车服务。审批流程中的这个漏洞为Waymo创造了一个时间窗口，使其能够在没有某些标准收费法规约束下运营其Ojai车辆。这代表了该公司在过渡性监管期间扩展自动驾驶汽车服务的一个不寻常机会。

title: Say hello to Claude Wrapped
summary: Anthropic has introduced a "reflect" feature for Claude that provides users with year-in-review analytics similar to Spotify Wrapped, showing usage patterns and frequently discussed topics. The dashboard allows users to analyze their Claude interactions over customizable timeframes and understand their task delegation habits. The feature reflects the broader trend of AI companies adopting engagement-focused year-in-review experiences.
content:
The popularity of Spotify Wrapped has kicked off a wide range of year-in-review features, on apps from YouTube to Uber - and now, the lookback trend has come to AI. Anthropic on Thursday announced a "reflect" feature for its Claude chatbot, allowing users to see an analysis of their usage data over the past month, three months, six months, or year. 
Anthropic bills the reflection dashboard as a way to "see your patterns and shape them," the company wrote in a blog post. It begins with a summary of an individual's key topics brought up with Claude, as well as types of tasks they delegate and their usage patterns, including peak usage times.  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 向Claude Wrapped问好
zh.summary: Anthropic为Claude推出了"reflect"功能，为用户提供类似Spotify Wrapped的年度回顾分析，展示使用模式和频繁讨论的话题。仪表板允许用户在可自定义的时间框架内分析Claude交互，并了解任务委派习惯。该功能反映了人工智能公司采用以参与度为中心的年度回顾体验的更广泛趋势。

title: Character.AI wants a piece of the microdrama pie
summary: Character.AI has launched c.ai Series, AI-generated short-form episodic videos that blend interactive entertainment with its core chatbot functionality. The animated microdramas allow viewers to interact with characters and influence storylines through dialogue. This move positions Character.AI to capture market share in the growing microdrama industry, projected to reach $26 billion in coming years.
content:
Character.AI's plan to become more than just an LLM-powered chatbot platform is going beyond interactive books, comics, and audio dramas. Today, the company announced the debut of c.ai Series - short-form, episodic videos designed to be watched and interacted with - on your phone. 
Unlike traditional microdrama services that feature cheaply produced, live-action shows starring human performers, c.ai Series are animated and almost entirely made with generative AI. The company's interest in getting into the microdrama space isn't surprising considering that it's projected to become a $26 billion industry in the next few years. And even though …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Character.AI欲在微短剧市场分一杯羹
zh.summary: Character.AI推出了c.ai Series，这是由人工智能生成的短篇连续剧视频，将互动娱乐与其核心聊天机器人功能相结合。这些动画微短剧允许观众与角色互动，并通过对话影响故事情节。这一举措使Character.AI能够在增长中的微短剧产业中获得市场份额，该产业预计在未来几年内将达到260亿美元。

title: The newest entrant in the military’s launch competition isn't actually a launch company
summary: A non-launch company has become an unexpected participant in the U.S. military's launch service competition, challenging traditional aerospace industry dominance. The surprise competitor represents a departure from conventional expectations about who can compete for military space contracts. This development suggests evolving priorities or changing criteria in how the Defense Department evaluates launch capabilities.
content: "I think it's fair to say that Phase 3 did not contemplate this."

zh.title: 军方发射竞争中的新参赛者其实不是火箭公司
zh.summary: 一家非发射公司成为美国军方发射服务竞争中的意外参赛者，挑战传统航空航天工业的主导地位。这个令人惊讶的竞争对手代表了对谁可以竞争军事太空合同的传统期望的偏离。这一发展表明国防部在评估发射能力时的优先事项在不断演变或标准在改变。

title: Popular open source AI developer tool Ollama raises $65M, grows to nearly 9M users
summary: Ollama, an open-source tool for running AI models locally on personal computers, has raised $65 million in funding and grown to nearly 9 million users. The Benchmark-backed platform has become a popular choice among developers seeking to run AI inference without cloud dependencies. The substantial funding and user base reflect growing demand for accessible, local AI deployment tools.
content: Benchmark-backed Ollama has amassed 176,000 stars, and nearly 17,000 forks on GitHub by helping developers easily run AI on their PCs.

zh.title: 流行的开源AI开发工具Ollama融资6500万美元，用户数接近900万
zh.summary: Ollama是一个开源工具，可在个人计算机上本地运行AI模型，已融资6500万美元，用户数增长到近900万。这个由Benchmark支持的平台已成为寻求无需云依赖运行AI推理的开发者的热门选择。大额融资和庞大用户基数反映了人们对可访问、本地AI部署工具的需求不断增长。

title: Character.AI enters the microdrama arena with its own productions, but there’s a twist
summary: Character.AI is launching interactive microdrama productions where viewers can chat with characters, ask questions, and influence story outcomes using the platform's chatbot technology. The approach combines short-form video entertainment with interactive AI dialogue, differentiating it from traditional microdrama services. This strategy leverages Character.AI's existing conversational AI capabilities to create unique engagement opportunities.
content: In an interesting twist that takes advantage of the company's core product, users can chat with these shows' characters, ask them questions, and even roleplay different storylines.

zh.title: Character.AI进入微剧领域推出自己的作品，但有个转折
zh.summary: Character.AI正在推出互动微剧作品，观众可以与角色聊天、提问，并利用该平台的聊天机器人技术影响故事结局。这种方式结合了短视频娱乐与互动AI对话，使其与传统微剧服务有所不同。这一策略充分利用Character.AI现有的对话AI功能创造独特的互动机会。

title: FL Studio 2026 turns its AI chatbot into your assistant engineer
summary: FL Studio 2026 has upgraded its Gopher AI assistant from a passive instruction tool to an active music production assistant capable of executing audio tasks directly. The chatbot can now create drum patterns, adjust audio effects, and make production decisions without manual user intervention. This evolution demonstrates how AI assistants are transitioning from informational helpers to active collaborators in creative workflows.
content:
Gopher can’t play the piano for you, but it can bury it in the mix. | Image: Image Line	

Last year, Image Line introduced Gopher for FL Studio, an AI chatbot that was basically a glorified instruction manual. You asked it how to do something, and it would serve up the relevant instructions. It's the kind of thing I actually use AI for on a semi-regular basis. But in the new release, Gopher can actually execute actions on your behalf. I was able to ask Gopher to lay down a four-on-the-floor kick, with snares on the backbeat, then add a gated reverb on the snare for that '80s pomp, and it executed the instructions flawlessly. 
Gopher does have some limitations. It can't create and draw automation for you. It can't insert notes or …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: FL Studio 2026将其AI聊天机器人变成了你的助理工程师
zh.summary: FL Studio 2026已将其Gopher AI助手从被动的指导工具升级为能够直接执行音频任务的活跃音乐制作助手。聊天机器人现在可以创建鼓节奏、调整音频效果，以及在无需手动干预的情况下做出制作决策。这种演变展示了AI助手如何从信息提供者转变为创意工作流中的主动协作者。

title: Truecaller clashes with India’s telecom regulator over anti-spam rules
summary: Caller ID company Truecaller is in conflict with India's telecom regulator over anti-spam rules, with users increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from dedicated business numbers. The clash highlights tensions between caller ID services and regulatory enforcement.
content: The caller ID company says users are increasingly ignoring and blocking calls from India's dedicated business number series.

zh.title: Truecaller与印度电信监管机构就反垃圾邮件规则发生冲突
zh.summary: 来电显示公司Truecaller与印度电信监管机构在反垃圾邮件规则方面发生冲突，用户越来越多地忽视和拦截来自专业商业号码的呼叫。这场冲突突显了来电显示服务和监管执法之间的紧张关系。
